name: @plimsoll/cli
description: Plimsoll — the load line for your AI spend. Local-first telemetry collector + dashboard for Claude Code & Codex.

scripts.build: esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/cli.mjs --external:better-sqlite3 && cp src/dashboard.html dist/dashboard.html && chmod +x dist/cli.mjs
